name: Mistakes to avoid when chasing law firm AI visibility?

mainEntity.name: Mistakes to avoid when chasing law firm AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Don't rely on website SEO, self-claims, or low-authority lists—AI dismisses them.** Focus verified only. **Key factors:** 1) No patterns; 2) Ignoring audits; 3) Generic bios; 4) No monitoring. Audit first, target peers, align PR. Avoid 90% wasted effort.[1][2][3]
